name: Mère et Mensonges
overview: When Aminata returns to Dakar, her presence reopens old wounds and unsettles lives that seemed carefully rebuilt. Between love, jealousy, and unspoken betrayals, marriages are tested and loyalties begin to crack. As secrets surface and desires clash, the line between truth and lies becomes dangerously thin. Motherhood, power, and obsession collide in a story where every choice has consequences.

trailers.title: Série - Mère et Mensonges - Bande annonce - VOSTFR
